name: TRUIST FINANCIAL CORP
summary: Truist Financial Corporation is a bank holding company that provides a wide range of financial products and services through its subsidiary Truist Bank, a North Carolina-chartered bank. Its offerings include consumer and small business banking, wholesale banking, mortgage services, loan origination, deposit accounts, investment securities, and insurance-related services. It operates two primary segments: Consumer and Small Business Banking (CSBB) and Wholesale Banking (WB).

products.name: Consumer and Small Business Banking
products.description: Retail banking products including deposits, loans, and financial services for consumers and small businesses.

products.name: Wholesale Banking
products.description: Banking and financial services for commercial and institutional clients.

products.name: Mortgage Services
products.description: Mortgage loan origination, servicing, and related products including mortgage servicing rights (MSR).

products.name: Deposit Accounts
products.description: Various deposit products including certificates of deposit and core deposits.

products.name: Investment Securities
products.description: Available-for-sale and held-to-maturity investment securities including MBS and agency securities.

products.name: Derivative Financial Instruments
products.description: Interest rate and other derivative products for hedging and risk management purposes.
